data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when terms update.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the re-sign requirement when terms are updated, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for a re-sign requirement, but does not provide specific evidence or endpoints that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the step is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary evidence to assert a definitive outcome.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of re-sign requirement when terms update.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for re-sign requirement
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when terms are updated.
